subject: You have seen the food. Here is the business.
preheader: How FarmThru works, why we are opening it to investors, and what that means for you.
body:
Hi {first_name},

You have tried the food. You have met the farms. You know this is not a meal kit or a box you cannot customise. It is a farm-direct grocery store where every product traces to a named regenerative farm in NSW.

Now here is the business behind it.

FarmThru works on a simple model. Regenerative farms across NSW send their products to our Brookvale hub. Families order online and collect Monday to Friday. Zero middlemen. The food is days old, not weeks. The farmer earns a fairer price. That short supply chain is the entire business.

We are opening an equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal in mid-2026. For the first time, you can own a share of the grocery store you buy from. Minimum investment: $50. Maximum: $10,000 per investor.

We need to be upfront. Investing in early-stage businesses carries real risk. You could lose some or all of your investment. We will not downplay that. Full details, financials, and risk disclosure will be in the offer document on Birchal.

If you want first access before the campaign opens to everyone, a $5 refundable deposit secures your VIP spot. That means priority access, founder updates, and an exclusive Q&A.

Consider seeking independent financial advice. The disclosure document will be available on Birchal when the campaign launches.

Rachel & the FarmThru team
creative_brief: Investment email. Clean, data-forward design. Key business model illustrated simply (farm to hub to family). VIP deposit CTA button below. Birchal badge in footer. Honest, confident tone. No hype.
primary_text: You have tried the food. You have met the farms. Now here is the business behind it.
headline: You have seen the food. Here is the business.
